title: Zero Sum Ledger
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A forensic accountant tracking a trillion-dollar conspiracy realizes the numbers only add up if one of her murdered colleagues is still logging into the system every Tuesday at 3 AM.
long_description: A forensic accountant tracking a trillion-dollar conspiracy realizes the numbers only add up if one of her murdered colleagues is still logging into the system every Tuesday at 3 AM.
